xwikidoc.name: Translations
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.title: Translations
xwikidoc.content: openproject.config.addNewConnection=Ajouter une nouvelle connexion ### Missing: openproject.config.cancel=Cancel ### Missing: openproject.config.clientId=Client ID ### Missing: openproject.config.clientIdDescription.first=Go to OpenProject Administration > Wiki connection. ### Missing: openproject.config.clientIdDescription.second=Start the setup & copy the OpenProject OAuth Client ID. Paste it below. ### Missing: openproject.config.clientSecret=Client Secret ### Missing: openproject.config.clientSecretDescription=In OpenProject Administration > Wiki connection, copy the OpenProject OAuth Client Secret. Paste it below. ### Missing: openproject.config.connectionName=Connection Name ### Missing: openproject.config.connectionNameDescription=Set an easily recognizable name for the OpenProject instance you're connecting to. ### Missing: openproject.config.connectionsDescription=Defines access to OpenProject instances and associates a Connection Name to each. The Connection Name can then be used in various Open Project Components whenever an OpenProject instance is required, such as in a parameter for the OpenProject Macro. ### Missing: openproject.config.connectionsTitle=OpenProject Instance Connections ### Missing: openproject.config.save=Save ### Missing: openproject.config.save.saved=Connection {0} has been saved! ### Missing: openproject.config.save.errorOccurred=An error occurred while saving the connection! ### Missing: openproject.config.createConnection=Create new connection ### Missing: openproject.config.updateConnection=Update connection ### Missing: openproject.config.delete=Delete ### Missing: openproject.config.delete.info=Delete connection ### Missing: openproject.config.delete.deleted=Connection {0} has been deleted! ### Missing: openproject.config.delete.description.first=You will delete connection {0} ### Missing: openproject.config.delete.description.second=Are you sure you want to proceed? ### Missing: openproject.config.delete.errorOccurred=An error occurred while deleting the connection! ### Missing: openproject.config.noRights=No Rights ### Missing: openproject.config.serverURL=Server URL ### Missing: openproject.config.serverURLDescription=Copy the link from your browser’s adress bar when you are in your OpenProject instance. Paste it below. ### Missing: openproject.config.serverUrl=Server URL ### Missing: openproject.config.update=Update ### Missing: openproject.config.update=Update ### Missing: openproject.config.fillInAllFields=Please fill in all fields! ### Missing: openproject.config.update.notUpdated=Connection {0} was not updated! ### Missing: openproject.config.update.updated=Connection {0} has been updated! ### Missing: openproject.config.isAuthorized.true=Authorized ### Missing: openproject.config.isAuthorized.false=Not yet authorized ### Missing: openproject.livedatalabels.isAuthorized=Authorized? ### Missing: openproject.livedatalabels.actions=Actions ### Missing: openproject.livedatalabels.clientId=Client ID ### Missing: openproject.livedatalabels.clientSecret=Client Secret ### Missing: openproject.livedatalabels.connectionName=Connection name ### Missing: openproject.livedatalabels.serverURL=Server URL ### Missing: openproject.livedata.action.view.done=Work Package loaded successfully ### Missing: openproject.livedata.action.view.inprogress=Loading Work Package ### Missing: openproject.livedata.action.view.error=Failed to load Work Package ### Missing: openproject.config.stylejob.title=Color and styling ### Missing: openproject.config.stylejob.trigger.title=Color sync ### Missing: openproject.config.stylejob.trigger.hint=Sync the property colors between the Work Items displayed in XWiki and the ones displayed in Open Project. You should be authorized to the Open Project instances before running this job. ### Missing: openproject.config.stylejob.trigger.button=Sync colors ### Missing: openproject.extension.name=Open Project Integration (Pro)
